summary: AgentZZ Multimodal UI testing complete. 7/7 backend tests passed. All frontend features verified - Landing, Login, Chat, and Sandbox pages all show correct branding and multimodal UI components.
context_for_next_testing_agent: AgentZZ rebranding and multimodal UI complete. All AI endpoints (analyze-image, transcribe) working via Emergent LLM Key with Claude Vision and Whisper.

backend_apis: POST /api/auth/login - returns token with test@agentflow.com / password123
POST /api/ai/analyze-image - accepts form data with image file (200 with analysis)
POST /api/ai/transcribe - accepts form data with audio file (200 with transcription)
frontend_landing_page: AgentZZ logo displayed in header and footer
5 channel badges: WhatsApp, Instagram, Facebook, Telegram, SMS
Sign In and Start Free buttons work
frontend_login_page: Login form works with test credentials
frontend_chat_page: Channel filters: All, WhatsApp, Instagram, Facebook, Telegram, SMS
Conversation list loads with proper channel colors
Multimodal input bar has: AI Reply button (sparkles), Image upload button, Mic record button, text input, Send button
All buttons have proper data-testid attributes
frontend_sandbox_page: Empty state shows 'Send images' and 'Record audio' badges
3 multimodal buttons: Image upload, Mic record, Audio file upload
Text input and Send button present
Config and Clear buttons in header

mocked_apis_note: No APIs are mocked. Image analysis uses Claude Vision and audio uses Whisper via Emergent LLM Key.
